productDisplayName: Wrangler Women English Florals Salmon Grey Top
description: CompositionSalmon t-shirt with grey floral print, made of 100% cotton, has a band collar with an open V-neck running into a front full buttoned placket with fabric buttons, short sleeves with elasticated hems, pin tucked and thin laced chest panel, flaired panel at the bust with mild gathers at the mid back, drawcord at the hem and badge stitched at the left waistFittingComfortWash careHandwash in cold waterDo not machine washWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergentDo not bleachDo not wringDo not tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryDon that completely summery casual look in this flower printed cotton t-shirt from wrangler. The collared neck with a V-neck leading to a fabric buttoned placket and the short sleeves with elasticated hems enhance your feminine factor. The pin tucked and laced chest panel make you look all the more stylish, while the drawcord at the hem allows you to customise the Fit. Team this with jeans or skirts and ballerina flats for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
